durable_improvement: Wired the existing fail-closed deployment-evidence promotion decision into the Cloudflare Pages workflow after evidence acceptance and before consistency/finalization, added the promotion output to uploaded artifacts and the atomic manifest input set, and added a workflow contract test that enforces ordering, retention, and epistemic boundaries.

scope: promotion tests included in workflow gate
promotion executes after acceptance and before consistency/finalization
promotion artifact is retained after finalization input creation
summary preserves scientific and medical truth boundary

verification.repository_readback: GitHub accepted both additive test creation and workflow replacement commits.

deployment_proof.reason: No workflow run was associated with the workflow commit, and Cloudflare credentials/environment configuration remain external blockers.

limits: A source-level workflow contract is not proof that GitHub Actions executed.
No resolving Cloudflare URL, served identity, deployment metadata, or exact-commit runtime proof was produced.
Promotion authenticates bounded evidence composition only; it does not establish scientific or medical truth.
No diagnosis or treatment claim was created or published.
privacy_boundary: Contains repository paths, commit identifiers, test outcomes, and infrastructure claim boundaries only; no private chat, health material, credentials, secret values, or identifying personal data.
falsification_route: Remove or reorder the promotion step, omit its artifact, weaken the same-digest requirement, or remove the epistemic boundary; the committed workflow contract test must fail.
